description: Test vector for stellar-agent-toolset-attestation:v1 preimage + ed25519 signature.
version_note: Canonical layout source for the attestation preimage.
capabilities_note: Single token 'sign-payment'; sorted by CapabilitySet::iter() (BTreeSet order); comma-joined.
preimage_note: ATTESTATION_DOMAIN_TAG (36 bytes) || u32_be(len('test-toolset')) || 'test-toolset' || u32_be(len('1.0.0')) || '1.0.0' || u32_be(64) || shasum_hex || u32_be(len('sign-payment')) || 'sign-payment'
key_type: ed25519 ephemeral test key derived from fixed AUDITOR_TEST_SEED in tests/attestation_vector.rs (NEVER a mainnet key)
auditor_test_seed_note: AUDITOR_TEST_SEED = 0x21..0x40 (32 bytes); distinct from publisher TEST_SEED (0x01..0x20); see tests/attestation_vector.rs
test_note: The auditor_public_key_hex and signature_hex are committed constants that lock the attestation preimage layout. Tests in tests/attestation_vector.rs assert that test-time signatures EQUAL these constants, locking the layout and ed25519 determinism. The preimage bytes are the authoritative byte-layout source for the attestation preimage.
